description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style oven with a square, boxy form and a single large burner on top, surrounded by a heavy-duty cast iron grate. The exterior is predominantly dark metal with a slightly weathered, matte finish, suggesting frequent use or exposure to the elements. The front face features a single, prominent rotary control knob with a red accent, likely for adjusting the burner flame. Both side panels have a row of circular ventilation holes, while the rear panel is plain and unadorned. The oven's top surface is flat and sturdy, suitable for supporting cookware or other objects. Its utilitarian design and durable materials make it well-suited for outdoor or urban environments such as street food stalls, garages, or communal cooking areas.
description: A heavy-duty, square metal oven with a large burner and cast iron grate on top, featuring a single control knob and side ventilation holes. The exterior is dark, matte, and slightly weathered, giving it an industrial look.
description_view_0: Side view showing a row of five circular ventilation holes and the flat, dark metal exterior.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the main control knob centered below the burner, with a solid lower panel and no ventilation holes.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, with five circular ventilation holes and a flat metal surface.
description_view_3: Rear view with a plain, unbroken metal panel and no visible features or openings.
attribute_control_panel_design: The control panel consists of a single, centrally located rotary knob with a red accent ring, set into a flat metal surface. There are no visible labels, digital displays, or additional controls. The design is minimalistic and functional, with the knob being the only interactive element.
attribute_door_handle_type: No door handle is visible; the oven appears to lack a traditional door, focusing instead on the exposed burner and control knob.
attribute_ventilation_features: Rows of five circular ventilation holes are present on both side panels, evenly spaced and aligned horizontally.
